case_title: DOLINER, ALEKSANDR VS THE CITY & COUNTY OF S.FCO PUBLIC UTIL/& M/RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DOLINER, ALEKSANDR AS TO DEFENDANT THE CITY & COUNTY OF S.FCO PUBLIC UTIL/& M/RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27125, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOLINER, ALEKSANDR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE CITY & COUNTY OF S.FCO PUBLIC UTIL/& M/RAILWAY JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27125 ON 3/19/03 EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM.
